meaning: n.分别,分歧处,(头发的)分缝adj.离别的,逝去的
examples: His parting words were 'I love you'.
The parting from his sister had a positive effect on John.
We had a tearful parting at the airport.
Santana even left a precious parting gift before he went -the first no-hitter in franchise history.
In all, we will unfortunately be parting ways with approximately 5% of our full time workforce.
